---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: panel-tabset
## Expeditions

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: center-row
::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
1
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX01/images/ho_ex01_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 1]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="HO_EX/HO_EX01/HO_EX01.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
2
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX02/images/ho_ex02_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 2]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="HO_EX/HO_EX02/HO_EX02.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
3
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=ACCESS+HERE');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 3]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="landing_pages/HO_EX03_landing/HO_EX03_landing.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
4
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=ACCESS+HERE');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 4]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="landing_pages/HO_EX04_landing/HO_EX04_landing.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
5
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 5]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="landing_pages/HO_EX05_landing/HO_EX05_landing.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
6
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 6]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="HO_EX/HO_EX06/HO_EX06.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
7
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 7]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="HO_EX/HO_EX07/HO_EX07.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
8
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 8]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="HO_EX/HO_EX08/HO_EX08.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
9
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 9]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="HO_EX/HO_EX09/HO_EX09.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
10
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 10]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="HO_EX/HO_EX10/HO_EX10.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

## Live Sprints

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: center-row
::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
1
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('IC_EX/IC_EX01.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[In-class Exercise 1]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/charles.ancheta6872/viz/In-classExercise1_17771005719550/Dashboard" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
2
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[In-class Exercise 2]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="IC_EX/IC_EX02/IC_EX02.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
3
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[In-class Exercise 3]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="IC_EX/IC_EX03/IC_EX03.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
4
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[In-class Exercise 4]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="IC_EX/IC_EX04/IC_EX04.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
5
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[In-class Exercise 5]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="IC_EX/IC_EX05/IC_EX05.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
6
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[In-class Exercise 6]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="IC_EX/IC_EX06/IC_EX06.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
7
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[In-class Exercise 7]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="IC_EX/IC_EX07/IC_EX07.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
8
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[In-class Exercise 8]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="IC_EX/IC_EX08/IC_EX08.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
9
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[In-class Exercise 9]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="IC_EX/IC_EX09/IC_EX09.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
10
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[In-class Exercise 10]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="IC_EX/IC_EX10/IC_EX10.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

## Deep Dives

::::::::::::::::::::::: center-row
::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
1
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Take-home Exercise 1]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="TH_EX/TH_EX01/TH_EX01.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
2
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Take-home Exercise 2]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="TH_EX/TH_EX02/TH_EX02.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
3
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Take-home Exercise 3]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="TH_EX/TH_EX03/TH_EX03.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
4
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/400x600/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Take-home Exercise 4]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="TH_EX/TH_EX04/TH_EX04.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::

## The Masterpiece

:::::::: center-row
::::::: {.gallery-item .masterpiece-card}
::: huge-number
1
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster .masterpiece-poster style="background-image: url('https://placehold.co/600x400/2b2b2b/FFC107?text=Coming+soon');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Final Project]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="PROJECT/Project01.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::
::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
